blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
